title: Key Ethical Problems in AI Public Policy
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected core problems that arise at the intersection of AI development and public policy, and how they influence each other.
relationships: Problems like Bias and Lack of Transparency can erode public Trust, complicating Policy-making. Decisions on Accountability directly impact how Safety and Privacy are enforced. Economic Disruption pressures policymakers to act, potentially rushing solutions for other problems like Safety. All problems converge on the central challenge of creating effective and ethical Governance.
